heading: Tuesday Night
text: Increasing clouds. A spotty snow or rain shower late.

heading: Wednesday
text: Clouds, limited sun. A spotty flurry or sprinkle.
temperature: Mid 40s to mid 50s north to south

heading: Thursday
text: More sun west, more clouds east. A stray flurry or sprinkle northeast.
temperature: Upper 40s to upper 50s north to south
